name: 服务条款页面布局
description: RummyRoyal 主题服务条款页面布局

config.content.title: Terms of Service
config.content.body: These Terms of Service govern your use of the RummyRoyal platform. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.
config.toc.items:
Eligibility|You must be at least 18 years prior and a resident of a state where online rummy is legal to use our services. By creating an account, you confirm you meet these requirements.
Account Registration|You must provide accurate and complete information during registration. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
Gameplay Rules|All games on RummyRoyal follow standard Indian Rummy rules. Any form of collusion, cheating, or use of automated tools is strictly prohibited and will result in permanent ban.
Deposits & Withdrawals|Deposits can be made via UPI, net banking, debit/credit cards, and wallets. Withdrawals are processed within 24 hours after KYC verification.
Fair Play Policy|RummyRoyal uses RNG-certified card shuffling to ensure fair gameplay. Our systems are regularly audited by independent third parties.
Intellectual Property|All content, designs, and software on the platform are the intellectual property of RummyRoyal. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.
Limitation of Liability|RummyRoyal is not liable for losses arising from gameplay, technical issues beyond our control, or unauthorized account access due to user negligence.
